cases.expected_behavior: Every product-spine schema is valid JSON, uses the supported schema shape, and includes shared product-spine identity fields.
cases.failure_mode: Future API/MCP/dashboard work consumes unstable or inconsistent object contracts.

cases.expected_behavior: Each object schema has a real example mapped from current repo artifacts, and every example validates.
cases.failure_mode: Schemas describe imaginary future state instead of current KRN artifacts.

cases.expected_behavior: The known-bad EvalRun fixture fails validation because it omits the interpretation caveat.
cases.failure_mode: Green eval reports can be treated as broad product or productivity proof without caveats.
